About Lakecia · Variant 09

A technologist who has sat in the rooms where the stakes were real.

Lakecia brings 25 years of technology leadership to women navigating AI, boardrooms, and enterprise transformation.

Meet the advisor behind the strategy.

Her path

Lakecia Gunter is a former CTO at Microsoft, former Chief of Staff to the CEO at Intel, and began her career as a Digital Logic Designer supporting the U.S. Department of Defense. She has helped shape platforms and decisions at enterprise scale.

Her perspective

Her work is grounded in both technical depth and executive empathy: billion-dollar platforms, public-company board service as an Independent Director at IDEX Corporation, and the lived understanding that leadership often asks women to be excellent and alone.

Her voice

As host of the ROAR podcast and Co-Founding Advisor to TechArena.ai, Lakecia creates space for women to speak with power, understand technology, and move without apology.

25 years

Enterprise technology leadership.

$1B+

Platforms and transformations influenced.

Top 50

Recognized among Black Business Women in the U.S.

For women leaders who need clarity before momentum.

Meet the advisor behind the strategy.

AI strategy with room to breathe · hello@lakeciagunter.com
